expandedPrompt: A cheerful baseball dude with an oversized expressive head, featuring a rounded face and bright smile. He wears a baseball cap with rounded crown, panel seams, top button, and curved front brim. His body is compact and connected, dressed in a classic baseball jersey with stripes and a number on the back, paired with baseball pants. The avatar has a baseball glove on one hand and a baseball bat resting on the other shoulder. His shoes are sporty with visible laces and a sleek design. The color palette includes vibrant reds, whites, and blues, enhancing the playful and energetic vibe of the character.

The color palette includes vibrant reds, whites, and blues, enhancing the playful and energetic vibe of the character.",

    "Classic baseball jersey with stripes and a number on the back.",
    "Baseball glove on one hand.",

    "Bright and vibrant color palette of red, white, and blue.",

  "body": "body_capsule",

    "body_flame",
    "body_mushroom"

    {"shape":"body_mushroom","anchor":"body","x":0,"y":-50,"scale":[0.5,0.5],"rotate":0,"material":"glossyWhite","role":"part","z":9,"attach":{"socket":"body.back"}},

rawReactCssCharacterContent:
{
  "componentName": "BaseballDude",
  "styleSystem": "my-dude-react-css-scaffold",
  "title": "Baseball Dude",
  "summary": "A cheerful baseball dude with an oversized expressive head and sporty attire, ready to hit a home run.",
  "cssVariables": {
    "--dude-primary": "#ff0000",
    "--dude-secondary": "#ffffff",
    "--dude-accent": "#0000ff",
    "--dude-eye": "#e0f2fe",
    "--dude-panel": "rgba(255,255,255,.18)",
    "--dude-mouth": "#0f172a",
    "--dude-body": "#1e293b",
    "--dude-arm": "#ff0000",
    "--dude-hand": "#facc15",
    "--dude-leg": "#1e293b",
    "--dude-foot": "#facc15"
  },
  "headShape": "rounded",
  "bodyShape": "compact",
  "expression": "excited",
  "parts": [
    { "type": "hat", "side": "headTop", "label": "baseball cap", "tone": "primary" },
    { "type": "glove", "side": "leftHand", "label": "baseball glove", "tone": "accent" },
    { "type": "jersey", "side": "bodyFront", "label": "baseball jersey", "tone": "secondary" },
    { "type": "pants", "side": "bodyFront", "label": "baseball pants", "tone": "body" },
    { "type": "shoes", "side": "leftFoot", "label": "sporty shoes", "tone": "hand" }
  ],
  "customPrimitives": [
    { "id": "baseball-bat-body", "groupId": "baseball-bat", "label": "baseball bat body", "anchor": "rightHand", "shape": "rect", "x": 10, "y": 0, "width": 10, "height": 80, "rotate": 15, "tone": "primary", "outline": true, "held": true, "gripX": 0.5, "gripY": 0.95 },
    { "id": "baseball-bat-end", "groupId": "baseball-bat", "label": "baseball bat end", "anchor": "rightHand", "shape": "circle", "x": 10, "y": 80, "width": 20, "height": 20, "tone": "accent", "outline": true, "held": true, "gripX": 0.5, "gripY": 0.5 }
  ],
  "notes": [
    "The character features an oversized expressive head with a bright smile.",
    "The baseball cap is designed with a rounded crown, panel seams, top button, and curved front brim.",
    "The baseball glove is attached to the left hand, and the bat is held in the right hand."
  ]
}
